Lamine Yamal's incredible 8.33 average rating puts him at the very top of LaLiga, even ahead of Kylian Mbappé!
Lamine Yamal isn't just scoring, he's also bossing the LaLiga assist chart with an impressive 11 setups!
Erling Haaland is simply unstoppable, leading the Premier League scoring charts with an incredible 27 goals for Manchester City!
Barcelona has been absolutely unstoppable in LaLiga, losing a mere 5 games while amassing an incredible 94 points after 37 matches!
Ghanaian star Antoine Semenyo is absolutely on fire, bagging 16 goals this Premier League season and sitting as the third-highest scorer for Manchester City!

Think ultimate Premier League dominance? 🤔

Sir Alex Ferguson: 13 Premier League titles in 27 years.
Arsene Wenger: 3 Premier League titles in 22 years.

The gap between these two legends is absolutely WILD when you look at silverware! Fergie wasn't just a manager; he was an absolute monarch of English football for decades. 👑 What an era!
Wolverhampton Wanderers have endured an incredibly tough Premier League campaign, only securing a mere 3 wins in 37 matches!
Arsenal may lead the Premier League by 4 points with one game to go, but both they and Manchester City share an identical +43 goal difference, making the title race even more fascinating!
Tottenham Hotspur are surprisingly battling in 17th place in the Premier League, having only managed 38 points after 37 games!
Arsenal's rock-solid defense has been key this Premier League season, conceding a league-low 26 goals after 37 games!
There's a massive 10-point chasm separating second-placed Manchester City from third-placed Manchester United in the Premier League standings!
